titleStmt.title: SII 5.520: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 520. (A.R. No. 221 of 1894). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷer
taru taṉ ṟoṅkal veṇkuṭai
kkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmaka
ṭ puṇarn=tu ceṅko locci
k karuṅkali kaṭin tu taṉ ciṟiyatāt
aiyaiyu n=ti ruttamaiyaṉaiyuṅ ku
ṟikoḷ taṉ Iḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum
neṟiyuṇar taṉ tirupputalvar tam
maiyu n=tu ṉṟeḻil vāṉava
ṉ vallavaṉ miṉavaṉ kaṅkaṉ
Ilaṅkaiyark kiṟaivaṉpulaṅke
ḻil pallavaṉ kaṉṉakucciyar kāvala
ṉena poṉṉaṇic cuṭarmaṇi makuṭa
ñ cūṭṭip palarpukaḻ Āṅkavark kavar
ṉā ṭaruḷip pāṅkamar tātaimuṉvan=ta
potalar teriyalvikkiramanāraṇaṉṟaṉ
ṉaic cak ṭippaṭuttaruḷa naṟkava ṉavatari
tta Orupatānāḷāl tiru maṇimauli vāḻiyar
pūven=ti yacoḻaṉeṉap puṉain=tu maṉṉu
palūḻiyuḷ teṉṉavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇa
ṉ poṉmuṭi Āṉāp parumakiṭ pacu- n=ta lai poruka
ḷattarin=tu vāraḷaviya kaḻal virakeraḷaṉai muṉai v
aiyip piṭittut taṉattivāraṇak katakkaṭakkaḷiṟṟā lu
taippittaruḷi An=ta mil perumpukaḻc cun=ta ra
pāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇkavariyum ciṅkāsa na
mum veṅkaḷat tiḻan=tu taṉ muṭi(r)viḻat talaiviri
t taṭitaḷar nto ṭat tollaiyil mullaiyūr
(t) turatti Olakalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic ce
ṇāṭ ṭotukki mevupukaḻ Irāmakuṭamuvar ke
ṭamuṉin=tu miṭarkeḻu villavaṉ kuṭar maṭik
koṇṭu taṉṉāṭu viṭṭoṭik kāṭupukko
ḷippa vañciyam putumalar malain=tā ṅ keñcalil
velaikeḻu kān=ta ḷurccālai kalamaṟuppittu
Āhomallaṉum Añcak kevutaṉṟāṅkarumpaṭaiyāl Āṅka
vaṉ ceṉaiyuṭ kaṇṭappayaṉuṅ kaṅkātiraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu
maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritara vikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum karumuraṭccā
ṅkamayyaṉum mutaliṉar samarabhī- ruvottu vottuṭai
ya nimir cuṭar poṉṉoṭayaṅkaripuraviyoṭum piṭittu
taṉṉāṭaiyi
l jayaṅkoṇ
ṭoṉṉār koḷ
ḷippakākkai Uḷḷe
ri maṭuppit torutaṉit
taṇṭāl porukaṭa lila
ṅkaiyar komakaṉ vikkira
mabā hu viṉ makuṭamum mu
ṉṟaṉakkuṭain=tu teṉ
ṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatu
miḻataṭ ṭeḻkaṭa liḻam pu
kka Ilaṅkecaṉākiya vik
kiramapāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇi
makuṭamuṅ kāṇṭaku taṉa
ṉatākiya kaṉṉakucciyilu
m Ārkali yiḻañ ciṟite
ṉ ṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅk
oḷ ṉāṭu taṉ Uṟavo
ṭum pukun=tu viḷaṅkumuṭi kavi
tta viracalāmekaṉ porkkaḷu t
tañcit taṉ kārkkaḷi ṟi(i)ḻan=tu kav
vaiyiṟ ṟoṭik kātaliyoṭum taṉ
ṟavvaiyai piṭittu tāyai muk
kariya Āṅkavamāṉa niṅkutaṟkāka miṭ
ṭuvan=tu taṉ vāṭṭoḻi luḻan=tu
veṅkaḷat tulan=ta vaccaṅkaḷatta
raicaṉ poṉṉaṇi muṭiyum kaṉ
ṉaraṉ vaḻi van turaikoḷa vviḻatta
raicaṉākiya cirvallavaṉ mataṉara
ājaṉ Elloḷittaṭa maṇimuṭiyuṅ
koṇṭaruḷi vaṭapulat tirukālāvatum
porupaṭai naṭāttik kaṇṭartiṉakaraṉ nāra
ṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teriyal maticū
taṉeṉ ṟeṉaip palavaraicarai mu
ṉaivaiyit turatti vampalar tarupo
ḻiṟā small inscribed slab containing 4 letters in each of the lines 74 to 81 is lost and its place is patched up with bricks. ṉakaruṭc caḷukkiyar māḷikai taka
rppi kkamil tant Aimuṉ van=ta kan=ta rak kaḷi
ṟṟu ca ti vikkiramaṉāraṇan ṟaṉ perumpa
ṭai Ālimuṉpamar hāhomallaṉa
ṉañ ṉum sahāsana meṟkoṇṭu
taṉ l periyāṟ ṟaṭaikarai pūṇṭura
kkaṭa ṉ kāvaiyil muṉṟā muṟaiyilum
me tiraviṭṭa valaṅkiḷar naṭuvel
teluṅka viccayaṉ tampiyar Iruvarum vampiyacilaik
kevuttarājaṉum Akkappayaṉum pittiyakaḷiṟṟu mi
kkacoḻaṉum koṇṭaiyarāja ṉumkuṉicilai
muñcaṉum taṇṭanāyakaṉ ṟārt taṉañceyaṉum mi
ṉappaiyaṉum viramāṇikkaṉum Eṉaippaṭai
ñaro ṭetir tmattā takarācaṉum Avaṉ
ṟuṇaiviyarum vā
kai viccayar makaṉu
mātāvu meṉu miva
r mutaliyar
puṉaikaḻal Araicarkḷo
ṭeṇṇarum kaḷirai
t tuṇṇeṉap piṭipiRead piṭip.
pit teḻarai Ilakkamum
pāḻpaṭac ciṉavil pūṇṭu
rapatiyai poṭipaṭutta
maiyil Īṇṭurak kaḻu
tai Ercela naṭatti vāraṭi
kai vitaittu maṇṇantip
payil pārparumāḷikai paṭa
reri parappi Āṅkamaraṉakar veṅ
kaimi teḻutiya Uyar cayattam
pa nāṭṭuvit tiyalicai vilavar mi
ṉavar veḷ
pulaccaḷukkiyar vallavar kocala
r vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cin=tu
rar Aiyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An=ta
ra mutaliṉar Aracar Iṭu tiṟaikaḷum Ā
ṟiloṉ ṟavaṉiyuṭ kūṟukoḷ p
oruḷkaḷum Ukan=tu ṉāṉmaṟaiyavar mu
kan=tu koḷakku ṭuttu viśva lokattu
viḷaṅku maṉuneṟiṉiṉ ṟaśva me
tañcey taraicu viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅk
oṇṭacoḻaṉ Ucarn=ta perum pu
kaṭ kovirājakecarivanma rāna Uṭ
aiyār śrīrājādhirājade varkku yā
ṇṭu muppattiraṇṭāvatu vaṭakarairā
jentra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu poykai
nāṭṭu tiruvaiyāṟṟu Olokamā
teviīśva ram Uṭaiyārkku Aṇuttara
pallavaraiyaṉum Atikāricci comayaṉ Amittiravalliyum śrīkāriyañceykiṟa nan=ta nū(r)
ruṭaiyāṉ celvaṉ mayilaiyum stā- ṉamuṭaiyuRead muṭaiya.kettiracivapaṇṭitarkkāka tiruvārātaṉai
ceyyum Āttiraiyaṉ nampi kāṭanampiyum māṉamutali pāratāyan celvaṉ ṉaraṅka(ṉ)
ṉāṉa rā jamāttāṇṭa brahma mārāyaṉum vaṇṇakku cāttaṉ ṉiṉṟāṉāṉaviracoḻaaṇu
kkamāyilaṭṭiyum patiyilāḷ nakkaṉ Araṅkamāṉa jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻat talaikkoliyum nakkaṉ pūmiyāna para
mākkaviṭaṅkat talaikkoliyum nakkan coḻa
viccātiriyāna Olo
kamātevit talaikkoliyu
m nakkaṉ pavaḻakkuṉṟāṉa matu
rān=ta kat talaikkoliyum Uḷ
ḷiṭṭa patiyārum karaṇat
tāṉ kecuvaṉ maturā
n=ta kaṉum poṟppaṇṭāri maṇi
matti mātavakkiramavittaṉum Ā
ka Ivvaṉaivar kaṇkāṇiyāl
piḷḷaiyār śrīviṣṇuvattanade var
ta(ṉ)nta ruḷiṉa rājarāja ṉ māṭaiyi
l māṭai munnūṟināl ceyta Āṟitak
kaṉ ceṅkaḻunir poṟpū Oṉṟināl po
ṉ Irukaḻañce kālāka ceta ceṅkaḻunir p
oṟpū nūṟṟaimpatināl kuṭiñaikkallā
l niṟai poṉ muṉṉūṟṟu muppatteḻu kaḻa
ñcaraiyum meṟpaṭiyārkaḷ kaṇkāṇiyāl U
ṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājade varkku yāṇṭu muppa
ttoṉṟāvatu piḷḷaiyār śrīviṣṇuvattanade var
tiruvaṭit toḻutaruḷi tiruvaṭikāṟai Iṭṭaruḷi
ṉa poṉṉāl caṇṭeśvara tevarkku cātti A
ruḷa ceta kāṟai Oṉṟināl kuṭiñaikkallāla
niṟai poṉ Aiṅkaḻañce mukkālemañcā
ṭiyum Itil naṭuvu kaṭṭina sapra- yokam Oṉṟi
nāl niṟai kāle Āṟumāvum Āka kalluṭppaṭa
niṟai Aṟukakaḻañce mañcāṭiyum Āṟumā
meppaṭayārkaḷ ka
ṇkāṇiyāl pūrvate
camuṅ kaṅkaiyuṅ koṇ
ṭaruḷiṉa periyatevarkku
yāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu
piḷḷaiyār śrīviṣṇuvattana
de var tantaruḷiṉa māṭai
toṇṇūṟṟu Oṉpatinā
l
Āṭavallār cāttia
ruḷa ceta tirukkālkkāṟai
Iraṇṭum tirukkaiyvaḷaiyi
l nālum kuṭiñaikkallā
l niṟai poṉ Eḻupatto
ṉpatiṉ kaḻañce Iraṇṭu mañ
cāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟi Ivare cāttia
ruḷa tiruccaraṇattu tacca takaṭu nā
lum poṟpū Irupattu muṉṟum tiru
kkoṭukkil takaṭu Iraṇṭum Uḷḷalai
kuṟun=ta katu Oṉṟum cerun=ti pū pati(ṉ)ṉo
ṉṟum koycakam Iraṇṭum Uḷppaṭa
poṉ muppattiru kaḻañce kālum (iv)
Ivve cārtti Aruḷum tāḻvaṭam
nālinaāl muttueṇṇūṟṟuañpa
ttoṉṟināl niṟai Irupattirukaḻañ
ce Āṟu mañcāṭiyum Iraṇṭu mā caraṇa
m Oṉṟil kotta muttu Āirattu
Oruṉūṟṟuoṉpatum tirukkoṭukki
l taitta muttu muṉṉūṟṟu Oru
pattañcum Āka muttu Āirattu nā
(ṉ)ṉūṟṟu Irupattu nālināl niṟai
nāṟpattu Eḻukaḻañce Āṟumañcā
ṭiyu mā Āka muttu I
raṇṭāyirattu Irunūṟṟu E
ḻupattañci(n)nāl niṟai Eḻupa
ttu Iru kaḻañce mañcāṭiyum mu
ṉṟu mā .
Digital edition of SII 5.520 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
